name: Nikkato Corporation
summary: Nikkato Corporation manufactures and sells industrial ceramics for use in the industrial and physicochemistry applications in Japan. The company offers wear and heat resistant, abrasion resistance, functional, and special refractory ceramics, as well as porcelain. It also provides heating devices and temperature sensors; measurement control equipment and systems; and electric furnaces. The company was founded in 1913 and is headquartered in Sakai, Japan.
